violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth left out by the stand mixer in the kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape on the stand up coolers on the server line and in the kitchen, is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Tables underneath the flat tops and cooking equipment have excess grease build-up and need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the kitchen and prep areas, underneath cooking equipment and prep areas need to be cleaned.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
